**[Attack of Opportunity](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=3)** <actions string="Reaction" /> If Takatorra's Attack of Opportunity is a critical success, they can choose to automatically [Disarm](/Actions.aspx?ID=41) the targeted creature in addition to dealing damage.

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

**Speed** 25 feet

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
_tengu gale blade_ +26 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Disarm](/Traits.aspx?ID=175), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=179), [Tengu](/Traits.aspx?ID=240)),
**Damage** 3d6+13 slashing

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
beak +24 ([Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=179), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=199)),
**Damage** 1d6+13 piercing

**Ranged**
<actions string="Single Action" />
_composite longbow_ +22 ([Cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=27), [deadly d10](/Traits.aspx?ID=174), [Propulsive](/Traits.aspx?ID=191), [range increment 100 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [volley 30 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=201)),
**Damage** 2d8+8 piercing plus 1d6 cold

**Blade Barrage** <actions string="Three Actions" />  Takatorra unleashes a flurry of attacks. Takatorra makes five melee Strikes. Their multiple attack penalty applies as normal. They gain a cumulative +2 circumstance bonus to damage for each successful Strike. If one target is hit with at least two of these Strikes, they also take 2d6 [persistent bleed damage](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29). They then become [stunned 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=36) and [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) until the start of their next turn.

**Disarming Whirl** <actions string="Two Actions" /> ([Flourish](/Traits.aspx?ID=73)) Takatorra spins, striking at their foes' weapons. Takatorra attempts an [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) check to [Disarm](/Actions.aspx?ID=41) against each enemy within melee reach. Each attempt counts toward Takatorra's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty does not increase until they have made all the attempts.

**Soaring Flight** <actions string="Two Actions" /> ([Morph](/Traits.aspx?ID=113), [Primal](/Traits.aspx?ID=134), [Tengu](/Traits.aspx?ID=240), [Transmutation](/Traits.aspx?ID=157)) **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** Takatorra expands their wings, gaining a 25-foot fly Speed for 5 minutes.

</column>
name: Takatorra (Level 13)

- **6th**

**Quickened Casting** <actions string="Free Action" /> ([Concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=32), [Metamagic](/Traits.aspx?ID=107)) If Yabin's next action is to cast a sorcerer cantrip or a sorcerer spell of 5th level or lower, he reduces the number of actions to cast it by 1 (minimum 1 action).

Each competitor on this team of elementalists has a unique special ability that only they can use; a fighter's ability is denoted by the individual's name in the traits parenthetical in the stat block below. Only that individual can use the ability (so, for instance, the Arms of Balance can't use Breath of the Volcano four times per round, since only Usvani knows that ability). Each fighter has a different rune on their _[handwraps of mighty blows](/Equipment.aspx?ID=441)_, allowing each to deal a different type of energy damage with their fist Strikes. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=14)): DC 36 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 34 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 31 [Arms Of Balance](/NPCs.aspx?ID=1487) **Source** [Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight!](/Sources.aspx?ID=86) pg. 33 **Perception** +27 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Goblin](/Languages.aspx?ID=6), [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1) +29, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) +30, [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=12) +26 **Str** +5 **Dex** +4 **Con** +4 **Int** +0 **Wis** +4 **Cha** +1 **Items** [_bracers of armor II_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=416), _+2 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [handwraps of mighty blows](/Equipment.aspx?ID=441)_ (with [_corrosive_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=292), [_flaming_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=295), [_frost_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=296), or [_shock_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=303) rune) --- **AC** 35 (37 vs. ranged attacks) **Fort** +27 **Ref** +27 **Will** +27 **HP** 300 --- **Speed** 45 feet **Melee** fist +27 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=199)), **Damage** 3d6+13 bludgeoning plus 1d6 acid, cold, electricity, or fire **Melee** tornado lunge +27 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [reach 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=192), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=199)), **Damage** 3d8+13 bludgeoning plus 1d6 acid, cold, electricity, or fire plus [Improved Knockdown](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=28) **Ranged** wind crash +27 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=188), [Propulsive](/Traits.aspx?ID=191), [range 30 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=199)), **Damage** 3d6+13 bludgeoning plus 1d6 acid, cold, electricity, or fire **Monk Ki Spells** DC 34, 2 Focus Points - **8th** [Wild Winds Stance](/Spells.aspx?ID=489), [Wind Jump](/Spells.aspx?ID=490) **Flurry of Blows** ([Flourish](/Traits.aspx?ID=73)) The monk makes two Strikes with their fists. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. **Breath of Energy Technique** The monk lets loose a powerful breath of air, whose effect depends on the type of energy to which the monk is attuned. The monk can't use this ability again for 1d4 rounds.
_Breath of the Glacier_ (Pravan Majinapti; cold) Pravan blows icy winds in a 30-foot cone, dealing 10d6 cold damage. Creatures in the area must attempt a DC 33 Reflex save as ice forms around them. The Speed penalty or [immobilized](/Conditions.aspx?ID=24) condition caused by this ability persist until a creature either Breaks Open the ice or [Escapes](/Actions.aspx?ID=79) (DC 37 in either case), or if the creature takes at least 30 fire damage.
**Critical Success** The creature is unaffected.
**Success** The creature takes half damage and takes a –5- foot status penalty to its Speeds.
**Failure** The creature takes full damage and takes a –15-foot status penalty to its Speeds.
**Critical Failure** The creature takes double damage and is immobilized.
_Breath of the Volcano_ (Usvani; acid) Usvani exhales a miasma of acidic fumes in a 15-foot emanation. A creature that starts its turn in the area takes 12d6 acid damage and must attempt a DC 33 Fortitude save.
**Critical Success** The creature is unaffected.
**Success** The creature takes half damage and is [sickened 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=34).
**Failure** The creature takes full damage and is sickened 2.
**Critical Failure** The creature takes double damage and is sickened 3.
_Draw of the Aurora_ (Ranya Shibhatesh; electricity) Ranya looses four lightning bolts, electrifying creatures and magnetizing them closer to her. Four 60-foot lines of electricity stretch out from Ranya's space, one in each cardinal direction, dealing 4d12 electricity damage. Each creature in an affected area must attempt a DC 33 Reflex save. If this ability causes an [undetected](/Conditions.aspx?ID=39) creature to glow, that creature becomes [hidden](/Conditions.aspx?ID=22) instead to creatures that can see any part of its space (even if it is [invisible](/Conditions.aspx?ID=26) or [Sneaks](/Actions.aspx?ID=63)).
**Critical Success** The creature is unaffected.
**Success** The creature takes half damage, glows until the end of the monk's next turn, and is [pulled](/Rules.aspx?ID=451) 5 feet toward Ranya.
**Failure** The creature takes full damage, glows until the end of the monk's next turn, and is pulled 15 feet toward Ranya.
**Critical Failure** The creature takes double damage, glows for 1 minute, and is pulled 30 feet toward Ranya.
_Magma's Gasp_ (Jivati Rovat; fire) Jivati's breath ignites a fire in the spirit of each creature within 10 feet of Jivati, dealing 8d6 fire damage. Each creature in the area must attempt a DC 33 Will save. **Critical Success** The creature is unaffected. **Success** The creature takes half damage. **Failure** The creature takes full damage and 1d6 [persistent fire damage](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29) and loses 1 Focus Point. If it has no Focus Points, the creature instead loses a random prepared spell or spell slot from the highest level it has left (maximum 6th level). **Critical Failure** As failure, but the creature takes double damage and 2d6 persistent fire damage.
name: Arms Of Balance

**[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=14)): DC 44 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 42 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 39 [Artus Rodrivan](/NPCs.aspx?ID=1490) **Source** [Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight!](/Sources.aspx?ID=86) pg. 35 **Perception** +27 **Languages** [Arcadian](/Languages.aspx?ID=88), [Elven](/Languages.aspx?ID=4), [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1) +26, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=10) +27, [Occultism](/Skills.aspx?ID=11) +25 **Str** +4 **Dex** +5 **Con** +3 **Int** +2 **Wis** +4 **Cha** +0 **Items** _+2 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [composite longbow](/Weapons.aspx?ID=74)_, _+2 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [elven curve blade](/Weapons.aspx?ID=50)_, _+1 [resilient](/Equipment.aspx?ID=279) [explorer's clothing](/Armor.aspx?ID=2)_ --- **AC** 35 **Fort** +25 **Ref** +29 **Will** +26 **HP** 330 **[Attack of Opportunity](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=3)** Artus can use his soul arrow for attacks of opportunity against creatures within 10 feet.
**Veering Miss** **Trigger** Artus misses but doesn't critically miss with a soul arrow longbow Strike; **Effect** The arrow veers back and attempts to hit the target again. Artus attempts a new ranged Strike using the same multiple attack penalty as the missed Strike. This veering attack doesn't count toward Artus's multiple attack penalty. This new attack roll ignores cover and greater cover. --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** _elven curve blade_ +23 ([Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=179), [Forceful](/Traits.aspx?ID=180), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103)), **Damage** 2d8+12 slashing **Ranged** _composite longbow_ +30 ([deadly d10](/Traits.aspx?ID=174), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [Propulsive](/Traits.aspx?ID=191), [range increment 100 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [volley 30 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=201)), **Damage** 3d8+12 piercing **Soul Arrow** When Artus Strikes with his longbow, he can shoot an arrow made from his soul. This arrow appears to be made of pure light and casts bright light in a 20-foot burst (and dim light for another 20 feet). When Artus rolls a critical hit on a longbow Strike with a soul arrow, the target is [dazzled](/Conditions.aspx?ID=7) until the end of Artus's next turn.
name: Artus Rodrivan

**Control Harrow Cards**   Lantondo can Strike with any of their harrow cards as long as they can see their target. When Lantondo Strikes with a harrow card, they can leave the card on any surface in the target's space or return the card to their deck at the end of the action.

[Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Goblin](/Languages.aspx?ID=6), [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43), [Ysoki](/Languages.aspx?ID=61)

[Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1) +28, [Arcana](/Skills.aspx?ID=2) +27, [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=5) +29, [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=9) +25, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=10) +25, [Occultism](/Skills.aspx?ID=11) +31, [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=14) +29, [Thievery](/Skills.aspx?ID=17) +26

---

<column gap="tiny">

**Speed** 25 feet

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
hair +28 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Disarm](/Traits.aspx?ID=175), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=179), [Grapple](/Traits.aspx?ID=184), [reach 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=192), [Trip](/Traits.aspx?ID=196), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=199)),
**Damage** 3d6+8 bludgeoning plus [Grab](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=18)

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
_jian_ +27 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=179), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=200)),
**Damage** 3d6+12 piercing

**Occult Prepared Spells** DC 38, attack +30
- **Cantrips (7th)**
[Daze](/Spells.aspx?ID=61), [Forbidding Ward](/Spells.aspx?ID=126), [Guidance](/Spells.aspx?ID=142), [Shield](/Spells.aspx?ID=280), [Telekinetic Projectile](/Spells.aspx?ID=334)
- **1st**
[Fear](/Spells.aspx?ID=110), [Ray of Enfeeblement](/Spells.aspx?ID=244), [True Strike](/Spells.aspx?ID=345)
- **2nd**
[Mirror Image](/Spells.aspx?ID=197), [Paranoia](/Spells.aspx?ID=214), [Silence](/Spells.aspx?ID=287)
- **3rd**
[Haste](/Spells.aspx?ID=147), [Paralyze](/Spells.aspx?ID=213), [Slow](/Spells.aspx?ID=289)
- **4th**
[Blink](/Spells.aspx?ID=27), [Confusion](/Spells.aspx?ID=48), [Phantom Pain](/Spells.aspx?ID=220)
- **5th**
[Black Tentacles](/Spells.aspx?ID=23), [Chilling Darkness](/Spells.aspx?ID=36), [Synesthesia](/Spells.aspx?ID=328)
- **6th**
[Feeblemind](/Spells.aspx?ID=112), [Repulsion](/Spells.aspx?ID=254), [True Seeing](/Spells.aspx?ID=344)
- **7th**
[Duplicate Foe](/Spells.aspx?ID=93), [Mask of Terror](/Spells.aspx?ID=185), [Warp Mind](/Spells.aspx?ID=369)
- **8th**
[Antimagic Field](/Spells.aspx?ID=14), [Dominate](/Spells.aspx?ID=87), [Mind Blank](/Spells.aspx?ID=192)

**Witch Hexes** DC 38, 3 Focus Points
- **Cantrips (8th)**
[Evil Eye](/Spells.aspx?ID=798)
- **8th**
[Cackle](/Spells.aspx?ID=792), [Curse of Death](/Spells.aspx?ID=794), [Malicious Shadow](/Spells.aspx?ID=800), [Needle of Vengeance](/Spells.aspx?ID=801)

**Choking Hair**   As long as Tak-nwa has a creature [grabbed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=20) with her hair, the creature cannot breathe and must succeed at a DC 5 flat check any time they attempt an action that involves speaking (including [linguistic](/Traits.aspx?ID=101) effects and Casting a Spell with a verbal component). On a failure, the action is disrupted.

**Empowered Hair**   Tak-nwa has mastered using her prehensile hair in combat. She can use her living hair to perform precise tasks such as picking up objects and performing simple Interact actions. She can also deliver hexes through her hair. Whenever Tak-nwa successfully casts a hex focus spell that requires 2 or more actions to cast and that doesn't require a spell attack roll, if her target is within reach, as part of the spellcasting activity she can make a hair Strike against the foe before applying any effects of the hex. If this Strike misses, the hex has no effect.

**Familiar**   Tak-nwa's familiar is an elephant hawk moth named Yon-so. Yon-so has a fly Speed of 40 feet, [darkvision](/Familiars.aspx?ID=5), and [scent](/Familiars.aspx?ID=11) as an imprecise sense to a range of 30 feet.

</column>
name: Syu Tak-nwa (Level 16)

<title level="2" right="Creature 16">[Blue Viper (Level 16)](/NPCs.aspx?ID=1493)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Unique" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=161" />
<trait label="NE" url="/Rules.aspx?ID=95" />
<trait label="Small" />
<trait label="Humanoid" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=91" />
<trait label="Ratfolk" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=234" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight!](/Sources.aspx?ID=86) pg. 36

**Perception** +30; [low-light vision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=23)

**Languages**
[Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Goblin](/Languages.aspx?ID=6), [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43), [Ysoki](/Languages.aspx?ID=61)

**Skills**
[Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1) +31, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) +18, [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=5) +25, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=6) +23, [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=15) +29, [Thievery](/Skills.aspx?ID=17) +27

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +0

**Dex** +5

**Con** +6

**Int** +5

**Wis** +2

**Cha** +1
</row>

**Infused Items** Blue Viper carries the following infused items: 2 [greater acid flasks](/Equipment.aspx?ID=74), 4 [greater alchemist's fires](/Equipment.aspx?ID=75), 6 [blightburn resins](/Equipment.aspx?ID=108), 4 [greater bottled lightnings](/Equipment.aspx?ID=76), 3 [deathcap powders](/Equipment.aspx?ID=111), 4 [greater elixirs of life](/Equipment.aspx?ID=91), 2 [greater frost vial](/Equipment.aspx?ID=77), 3 [malyass root pastes](/Equipment.aspx?ID=122), 9 [purple worm venoms](/Equipment.aspx?ID=126), 6 [shadow essences](/Equipment.aspx?ID=288), and 3 [spider roots](/Equipment.aspx?ID=129). These items last for 24 hours, or until the next time Blue Viper makes his daily preparations.

**Items**
[Dragon Bile](/Equipment.aspx?ID=112) (applied to body), _+2 [resilient](/Equipment.aspx?ID=279) [explorer's clothing](/Armor.aspx?ID=2)_, _+2 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [shortsword](/Weapons.aspx?ID=43)_

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

<row gap="medium">
**AC** 36 

**Fort** +30 

**Ref** +29 

**Will** +24 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**HP** 300

</row>

**Poisoned Coat** <actions string="Reaction" /> **Trigger** A creature adjacent to Blue Viper hits him with a melee [unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=199) Strike; **Effect** The triggering creature is exposed to [dragon bile](/Equipment.aspx?ID=112). This consumes the poison and Blue Viper can't use Poisoned Coat again until he spends 10 minutes applying one dose of contact or injury poison to his clothing.

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

**Speed** 25 feet

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
_shortsword_ +29 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=179), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=200)),
**Damage** 3d6+8 piercing

**Ranged**
<actions string="Single Action" />
alchemical bomb +31 ([range increment 20 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [Splash](/Traits.aspx?ID=150)),
**Damage** varies by bomb

**Quick Application** <actions string="Single Action" />  Blue Viper Interacts to draw an [injury](/Traits.aspx?ID=97) poison and applies it to a weapon he is holding.

**Pinpoint Poisoner**   When Blue Viper successfully Strikes a [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) creature with a poisoned weapon or exposes a flat-footed creature to an [inhaled](/Traits.aspx?ID=96) poison, the creature takes a –2 circumstance penalty to its initial save against that poison.

**Poison Spray** <actions string="Single Action" />  **Requirements** Blue Viper is holding a [contact](/Traits.aspx?ID=37) or [injury](/Traits.aspx?ID=97) poison; **Effect** Blue Viper swigs the poison and sprays it out of his mouth, affecting a 15- foot cone. Blue Viper is not exposed to the poison. All creatures in the cone are immediately exposed to the poison and each creature must attempt a Fortitude save against the poison.

**Potent Poisoner**   Blue Viper's infused poisons have a DC of 37.

**Toxic Escape** <actions string="Two Actions" />  Blue Viper Interacts to draw an [inhaled](/Traits.aspx?ID=96) poison, deploys the poison in a smoke cloud that provides [concealment](/Conditions.aspx?ID=4) in a 5-foot emanation, then [Sneaks](/Actions.aspx?ID=63) up to his Speed. He is not exposed to the inhaled poison.

</column>
name: Blue Viper (Level 16)

**[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=14)): DC 45 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 43 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 40 [Shino Hakusa (Level 16)](/NPCs.aspx?ID=1494) **Source** [Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight!](/Sources.aspx?ID=86) pg. 36 **Perception** +30 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Goblin](/Languages.aspx?ID=6), [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43), [Ysoki](/Languages.aspx?ID=61) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1) +32, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) +30, [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=5) +26, [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=9) +28, [Occultism](/Skills.aspx?ID=11) +24, [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=15) +28, [Thievery](/Skills.aspx?ID=17) +28 **Str** +6 **Dex** +6 **Con** +4 **Int** +1 **Wis** +2 **Cha** +0 **Items** _+2 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [greater shock](/Equipment.aspx?ID=303) [handwraps of mighty blows](/Equipment.aspx?ID=441)_, _[potion of flying](/Equipment.aspx?ID=189)_, _potion of haste_, _+2 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [returning](/Equipment.aspx?ID=301) [shuriken](/Weapons.aspx?ID=79)_ --- **AC** 38 **Fort** +27 **Ref** +31 **Will** +25 **HP** 300 **Nimble Dodge** **Trigger** Hakusa is targeted with a melee or ranged attack by an attacker she can see; **Effect** Hakusa gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. --- **Speed** 40 feet **Melee** _fist_ +32 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=179), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=188), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=199)), **Damage** 3d6+14 bludgeoning plus 1d6 electricity **Ranged** _shuriken_ +32 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [reload 0](/Traits.aspx?ID=254), [thrown 20 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=195)), **Damage** 3d4+14 piercing **Disorienting Tumble** Hakusa constantly leaps around and over her foes in combat. When she successfully [Tumbles Through](/Actions.aspx?ID=29) a creature's space, that creature becomes [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) until the end of Hakusa's turn. **Powerful Fists** Hakusa's fists are treated as [cold iron](/Equipment.aspx?ID=375) and [silver](/Equipment.aspx?ID=379) and don't take penalties when making lethal attacks. **Pressure Point Attack** Hakusa makes precise attacks that can debilitate a foe's movements. Hakusa makes a fist Strike. On a hit, the target takes damage as normal and must attempt a DC 38 Fortitude save. Regardless of the result of the save, the target is then temporarily immune to Pressure Point Attacks for 1 minute.
**Critical Success** The target is unaffected.
**Success** The target's muscles become temporarily weaker. For 1 round, the target is [enfeebled 2](/Conditions.aspx?ID=13) and must succeed at a DC 5 flat check when attempting to use actions with the [manipulate](/Actions.aspx?ID=639) trait or the action is lost.
**Failure** As success, but the duration is 1 minute.
**Critical Failure** As success, but the duration is 1 minute, the flat check is DC 11, and the target also takes –10-foot status penalty to their Speed for the duration. **[Sneak Attack](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=34)** Hakusa's Strikes deal an additional 4d6 precision damage to [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) creatures.
name: Shino Hakusa (Level 16)

**[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=14)): DC 45 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 43 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 40 [Ran-to (Level 16)](/NPCs.aspx?ID=1495) **Source** [Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight!](/Sources.aspx?ID=86) pg. 37 **Perception** +23; [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=12) **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Goblin](/Languages.aspx?ID=6), [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43), [Ysoki](/Languages.aspx?ID=61) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1) +26, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) +35, [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=7) +26, [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=16) +25, [Wrestling Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=8) +21 **Str** +7 **Dex** +4 **Con** +6 **Int** -1 **Wis** +1 **Cha** +2 **Items** _+2 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [gauntlet](/Weapons.aspx?ID=4)_, _+2 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [halfling sling staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=78)_ (20 bullets and 5 _[greater explosive bullets](/Equipment.aspx?ID=162)_), _+2 [resilient](/Equipment.aspx?ID=279) [studded leather armor](/Armor.aspx?ID=5)_ --- **AC** 38 **Fort** +30 **Ref** +26 **Will** +23 **HP** 380 **[Attack of Opportunity](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=3)** When a creature triggers Ran-to's Attack of Opportunity, he can attempt an [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) check to [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=35) the triggering creature instead of making a melee Strike. He can still disrupt a triggering [manipulate](/Actions.aspx?ID=639) action if he critically succeeds at his attempt. --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** _gauntlet_ +33 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Free-Hand](/Traits.aspx?ID=181)), **Damage** 3d4+17 bludgeoning plus [Improved Grab](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=27) **Ranged** _halfling sling staff_ +30 ([Propulsive](/Traits.aspx?ID=191), [range increment 80 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [reload 1](/Traits.aspx?ID=254)), **Damage** 3d10+11 bludgeoning **Body Slam** **Requirements** Ran-to has a creature [grabbed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=20) or [restrained](/Conditions.aspx?ID=33); **Effect** Ran-to throws his foe to the ground. The grabbed creature takes 10d6 bludgeoning damage (DC 37 [basic](/Rules.aspx?ID=329) Fortitude save) and is knocked [prone](/Conditions.aspx?ID=31). The grab ends. **Greater Leaping Catch** Ran-to bounds up and attempts to Grab a foe while he soars. He makes a [Leap](/Actions.aspx?ID=81), [High Jump](/Actions.aspx?ID=36), or [Long Jump](/Actions.aspx?ID=37). His maximum distance is 75 feet. He must succeed at an [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) check to perform the leap as usual, but regardless of the type of leap the DC is equal to half the number of feet he moves in the air. Ran-to can attempt an Athletics check to [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=35) at any point during the jump. Immediately after the attempt, he (and the creature, if the Grapple was successful) falls to the ground. Ran-to takes no falling damage when using this ability, but the [grabbed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=20) creature takes the appropriate amount of falling damage as if they had fallen the distance moved. **Titan Wrestler** Ran-to can attempt to [Disarm](/Actions.aspx?ID=41), [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=35), [Shove](/Actions.aspx?ID=38), or [Trip](/Actions.aspx?ID=40) creatures up to two sizes larger than him. **Whirlwind Toss** **Frequency** once per round; **Requirements** Ran-to has a creature [grabbed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=20) or [restrained](/Conditions.aspx?ID=33); **Effect** Ran-to spins the creature he's holding, smashing them against any creatures within his reach, and then throws the creature aside. Ran-to attempts an [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) check against the grabbed creature's Fortitude DC.
**Critical Success** Ran-to tosses his foe a great distance. The grab ends. The grabbed creature is thrown into a space within 10 feet, takes 12d6 bludgeoning damage, and falls [prone](/Conditions.aspx?ID=31). All creatures adjacent to Ran-to take the same amount of bludgeoning damage (DC 37 [basic](/Rules.aspx?ID=329) Reflex save).
**Success** As critical success, except the grabbed creatures is thrown into a space within 5 feet, and creatures take 8d6 bludgeoning damage.
**Failure** Ran-to tosses his foe aside. The grab ends. The grabbed creature falls prone.
**Critical Failure** Ran-to loses hold of his foe, causing the grapple to end.
name: Ran-to (Level 16)

**6th** [Dispel Magic](/Spells.aspx?ID=78), [Flesh to Stone](/Spells.aspx?ID=123), [Mislead](/Spells.aspx?ID=199), [Tangling Creepers](/Spells.aspx?ID=331) - **7th** [Chain Lightning](/Spells.aspx?ID=33), [Dispel Magic](/Spells.aspx?ID=78), [Reverse Gravity](/Spells.aspx?ID=261), [Spell Turning](/Spells.aspx?ID=297) - **8th** [Disappearance](/Spells.aspx?ID=73), [Polar Ray](/Spells.aspx?ID=224), [Power Word Stun](/Spells.aspx?ID=228), [Punishing Winds](/Spells.aspx?ID=240) - **9th** [Foresight](/Spells.aspx?ID=127), [Meteor Swarm](/Spells.aspx?ID=191), [Summon Elemental](/Spells.aspx?ID=320) **Druid Order Spells** DC 41, 2 Focus Points - **9th** [Impaling Briars](/Spells.aspx?ID=475), [Tempest Surge](/Spells.aspx?ID=479) **Halcyon Surge** Mafika casts an arcane spell that takes 2 actions or fewer to Cast, then casts a druid order spell that takes 2 actions or fewer to Cast (paying 1 Focus Point, as normal). **Shift Spell** ([Concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=32)) **Requirements** Mafika has an area spell active with a remaining duration and he is within the spell's range; **Effect** Mafika moves the spell's area to a new point of origin. The spell's remaining duration is reduced by half. Instantaneous or permanent effects of the spell (such as damage or healing) are unaffected and aren't repeated.
name: Mafika Ayuwari

As a leopard, the only Strikes she can make are a jaws Strike (which deals 3d6+10 piercing damage plus [Grab](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=18)) and an [agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170) claws Strike (which deals 3d4+10 slashing damage).

**Powerful Leap** <actions string="Two Actions" />  Akila [Leaps](/Actions.aspx?ID=81) either up to 50 feet horizontally and 10 feet vertically or up to 25 feet vertically and up to 10 feet horizontally. She can make a Strike at any point during the Leap. If she hits, she deals an extra 8 bludgeoning damage from the impact.

**[Sneak Attack](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=34)**   Akila deals an extra 1d6 precision damage to [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) targets.

</column>

**[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=14)): DC 41 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 39 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 36 [Surjit Hamelan](/NPCs.aspx?ID=1500) **Source** [Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight!](/Sources.aspx?ID=86) pg. 39 **Perception** +25; [low-light vision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=23) **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Mwangi](/Languages.aspx?ID=39), [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1) +26, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=10) +25, [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=15) +26, [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=16) +25 **Str** +3 **Dex** +5 **Con** +5 **Int** +0 **Wis** +4 **Cha** +0 **Items** _+2 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [composite shortbow](/Weapons.aspx?ID=75)_ with 20 arrows, _+2 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [hook sword](/Weapons.aspx?ID=163)_ --- **AC** 33 **Fort** +24 **Ref** +26 **Will** +23 **HP** 220 **[Attack of Opportunity](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=3)** Surjit can use a ranged weapon to make an Attack of Opportunity as though the weapon had a [reach](/Traits.aspx?ID=192) of 10 feet.
**Sense the Unseen** **Trigger** Surjit fails a Perception check to [Seek](/Actions.aspx?ID=84); **Effect** Surjit automatically senses any [undetected](/Conditions.aspx?ID=39) creatures in the area where he was Seeking, making them merely [hidden](/Conditions.aspx?ID=22) to him. --- **Speed** 25 feet, climb 20 feet, swim 20 feet **Melee** _hook sword_ +26 ([Disarm](/Traits.aspx?ID=175), [Parry](/Traits.aspx?ID=190), [Trip](/Traits.aspx?ID=196), [Twin](/Traits.aspx?ID=197)), **Damage** 2d6+11 slashing **Ranged** _composite shortbow_ +28 ([deadly 2d10](/Traits.aspx?ID=174), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [range increment 60 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [reload 0](/Traits.aspx?ID=254)), **Damage** 3d6+11 piercing **Camouflage** While in natural terrain, Surjit can [Sneak](/Actions.aspx?ID=63) even while [observed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=27). **Clear the Rain** ([Primal](/Traits.aspx?ID=134), [Transmutation](/Traits.aspx?ID=157)) Surjit Strides twice. Difficult terrain doesn't slow his movement. Any space Surjit enters becomes normal terrain rather than difficult terrain (or difficult terrain rather than greater difficult terrain) until the start of his next turn. **Rain-Scribe Arrow** When Surjit critically hits a creature with a ranged weapon or hits a creature for the second time on a turn with a ranged weapon, Surjit can attempt to [counteract](/Rules.aspx?ID=371) one magic effect on the creature (counteract level 7th). He uses his attack modifier as his counteract modifier. **[Sneak Attack](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=34)** Surjit deals an extra 2d6 precision damage to [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) targets.
name: Surjit Hamelan

Fight!](/Sources.aspx?ID=86) pg. 40 **Perception** +21 **Languages** [Minatan](/Languages.aspx?ID=90), [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43), [Wayang](/Languages.aspx?ID=91) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1) +30, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) +27, [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=7) +28, [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=12) +32 **Str** +4 **Dex** +5 **Con** +4 **Int** +0 **Wis** +0 **Cha** +5 **Items** [greater alchemist's fires](/Equipment.aspx?ID=75) (3), _[bracers of armor I](/Equipment.aspx?ID=416)_, _+2 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [flaming](/Equipment.aspx?ID=295) [scimitar](/Weapons.aspx?ID=38)_, _[greater sturdy shield](/Equipment.aspx?ID=327)_ (Hardness 15, HP 120, BT 60) with a _+2 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [shield boss](/Weapons.aspx?ID=41)_ --- **AC** 37 (39 with shield raised) **Fort** +25 **Ref** +28 **Will** +21 **HP** 275 **[Attack of Opportunity](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=3)**
**[Shield Block](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=32)** --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** _scimitar_ +31 ([Forceful](/Traits.aspx?ID=180), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [Sweep](/Traits.aspx?ID=194)), **Damage** 2d6+12 slashing plus 1d6 flaming **Melee** _shield boss_ +31 ([Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103)), **Damage** 2d6+12 bludgeoning **Ranged** greater alchemist's fire +32 ([splash 3 fire](/Traits.aspx?ID=72), [thrown 20 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=195)), **Damage** 3d8+3 fire plus 3 [persistent fire](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29) **Quick Draw** The battle dancer Interacts to draw a weapon and Strikes with it. **Shield Drum** The battle dancer [Raises a Shield](/Actions.aspx?ID=98), then [Demoralizes](/Actions.aspx?ID=53). **Threatening Dance** The battle dancer either Steps and then [Performs](/Actions.aspx?ID=59), or Performs and then Steps. Compare the [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=12) result to the Will DC of one creature in the battle dancer's reach. **Critical Success** The creature is [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) to all attacks until the start of the battle dancer's next turn. **Success** The creature is flat-footed to the next attack by a creature other than the battle dancer before the start of the battle dancer's next turn.

**Brutally Disarm** <actions string="Single Action" />  **Requirements** Urnak is wielding a two-handed weapon in both hands; **Effect** Urnak attempts to [Disarm](/Actions.aspx?ID=41) a creature within reach. On a success or critical success, Urnak deals 13 damage of the weapon's type to the Disarmed creature. If he rolls a failure to Disarm, he gets a success instead.

**Felling Throw** <actions string="Single Action" />  Urnak makes a ranged Strike with his greataxe. He has a +25 attack modifier for this Strike and the thrown greataxe's range increment is 40 feet. If he damages a flying creature, it descends 120 feet, possibly falling on the ground.

**Ricochet Throw**   When Urnak uses Felling Throw, his greataxe bounces back to him at the end of the action and he can catch it as a free action. If he uses Felling Throw again before the end of his turn (even if it's not at the same target), the attack ignores all cover.

**Sweep Aside** <actions string="Single Action" />  Urnak makes a melee greataxe Strike. If he hits a creature of his size or smaller, he can [move](/Rules.aspx?ID=451) it 5 feet in any direction, or 10 feet on a critical hit.

</column>

**[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=14)): DC 42 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 40 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 37 [Huldrin Skolsdottir](/NPCs.aspx?ID=1507) **Source** [Pathfinder #167: Ready? Fight!](/Sources.aspx?ID=86) pg. 42 **Perception** +25 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Skald](/Languages.aspx?ID=42) **Skills** [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) +27, [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=7) +20, [Warfare Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=8) +25 **Str** +5 **Dex** +2 **Con** +5 **Int** +3 **Wis** +3 **Cha** +0 **Items** _+2 [resilient](/Equipment.aspx?ID=279) [hide armor](/Armor.aspx?ID=7)_, _[greater sturdy shield](/Equipment.aspx?ID=327)_ (Hardness 15, HP 120, BT 60) with _+2 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [shield spikes](/Weapons.aspx?ID=42)_, _+2 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [flaming](/Equipment.aspx?ID=295) [trident](/Weapons.aspx?ID=45)_ --- **AC** 34 (36 with shield raised) **Fort** +26 **Ref** +25 **Will** +27 **HP** 280 **Resistances** [cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=27) 10 **[Attack of Opportunity](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=3)** Huldrin gets 1 extra reaction each turn that she can use only to make an Attack of Opportunity.
**[Shield Block](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=32)** This reaction also triggers when an ally adjacent to Huldrin takes damage from an attack or when Huldrin takes any damage (even non-physical damage) as a result of a Reflex save. <title level="1" pfs="">[Razu](/NPCs.aspx?ID=1512)</title>

<row gap="medium">

<column gap="medium" flex="1 1 400px">

Master Razu is one of the most prominent and successful performers of his generation, with a voice known for moving the social elite to tears on the stages of Goka and throughout western Tian Xia. By reputation, he is a shy but brilliant virtuoso who can play an enormous repertoire of folk songs and popular new music on nearly any instrument he puts his hands on. In person, he is a calculating social chameleon, continually intuiting what his audience wants to hear and giving it to them. He prefers to maintain an air of mystery and aloofness, but those close to him know that Razu can be goaded into explosive ranting if the merits of his acclaim are publicly called into question.

 Razu is private about his origins. He was born and raised in Goka, where he escaped the hard life of a scavenger only to become a much-abused servant in the theater houses of the Floating Lotus district. Although he pined for respect and admiration like the performers he watched from behind the stage, Razu didn't find a chance to use his incredible voice or knack for instruments until his parents died from extreme poverty and he fled the city in frustrated agony.

 The young man played a stolen erhu, his only possession, to scrape by as a traveling performer until he by chance impressed a Lingsheni general who saw the tactical application of what she called “a voice like thunder.” She took Razu on as a signaler in her army, and under her guidance the vocalist used his talents to coordinate the movements and configurations of some of Lingshen's greatest military troops. Razu left this post as soon as he had saved enough money to do so, but he kept in touch with his old comrades and sold Lingshen any secrets he gathered while he established his career as a heartbreaking opera star in Kwanlai. His work earned him connections to some of the most powerful warlords and arms brokers in Tian Xia.

 Recently, Razu has returned home with a vengeful debt to settle: his voice will bring the city that killed his parents to its knees. Although Razu has long harbored a violent disposition, his recent avowal can be traced directly to the influence of none other than this Adventure Path's demiplane-building axiomite villain, Syndara the Sculptor.

 As part of his scheme to undo his archrival the Ruby Phoenix and thoroughly sully her name in Goka's history books, Syndara formulated a plan to lure the devastating kaiju King Mogaru into the city. Syndara could use the kaiju egg he'd stolen from Mogaru to draw the behemoth toward Xu Hong Bay, but beyond that he could not risk exposing himself within Goka proper. To ensure Mogaru didn't simply just wander away from the city without first destroying it, Syndara would need to rely on the reptile king's well-known weakness for music. To create the booming songs that could lead the kaiju throughout the entire city, Syndara would need a powerful performer. Syndara soon learned of Razu's vengeful grief, a passion matched only by his extraordinary musical reputation. Through his intermediaries the Lightkeepers, Syndara contacted the virtuoso and made him an offer he could scarcely refuse—the opportunity to destroy Goka. 

<title level="2" right="">Campaign Role</title> The player characters have a chance to meet Razu during the first chapter of this adventure, where he comes across as a haughty and aloof performer. Canny players likely suspect that the tengu bard is implicated in the strange extraplanar magic that causes a minor catastrophe at the Empress Yin Opera House (page 17)—and although he wasn't responsible for the accident, he is indeed working for the axiomite who is. Without hard evidence there is little to be done. Afterward, Razu moves to the background; you might choose to insert him into any of the player characters' hijinks as they traverse the city. Razu could even provide background music at the tournament itself if you so wish.

 In Chapter 3, Razu reveals himself as a key player in the plot to lure King Mogaru into Goka, and the player characters must defeat him in order to save the city.

 Although he wishes to wreck all of Goka, Razu has chosen several specific targets for Mogaru's rampage. In preparation for this attack, he has strategically placed instruments on the rooftops of various towers, temples, and high-rises throughout the city. These sites include the Grand Bank of Abadar, Icefang Aerie, the Seven Dragons Bridge, and numerous other prominent locales the player characters may have already visited.

**Bow Basher**   Razu wields his instrument's unique rune-enchanted bow as a deadly weapon. His decades of training with the item allow him to augment it with his own battle cries so that it also deals sonic damage. By attaching the bow's case to its end, he can change the weapon's damage to piercing and use the bow much like a [short spear](/Weapons.aspx?ID=10). Any other creature who wields the erhu bow does not deal sonic damage with it, but the weapon otherwise possesses the traits listed above. If sold without its runes, the bow is worth 50 gp.

**Incredible Volume**   Razu's [auditory](/Traits.aspx?ID=16) effects that normally have a range 60 feet or less or an emanation area with a radius of 60 feet or less instead have a range or radius of 300 feet. His auditory effects that normally have a range of greater than 60 feet or an emanation area with a radius of greater than 60 feet instead have a range or radius of 1,200 feet (unless it was already farther). **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=14)): DC 40 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 38 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 35 [Rai Sho Postulant](/NPCs.aspx?ID=1513) **Source** [Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain](/Sources.aspx?ID=87) pg. 13 **Perception** +30; [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=12), [scent](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=33) (imprecise) 30 feet **Languages** [Aklo](/Languages.aspx?ID=13), [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43) **Skills** [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) +33, [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=15) +28, [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=16) +27 **Str** +9 **Dex** +5 **Con** +6 **Int** +2 **Wis** +6 **Cha** +2 **Snowblind** When [Hiding](/Actions.aspx?ID=62), the yeti is [concealed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=4) by any snowfall, even if it's not thick enough to make other creatures concealed. --- **AC** 39 **Fort** +30 **Ref** +27 **Will** +29 +4 status to all saves vs. [fear](/Traits.aspx?ID=68) and dreams **HP** 360 **Immunities** [cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=27) **Weaknesses** [fire](/Traits.aspx?ID=72) 10 **Nightmare Guardian** Yetis gain a status bonus to saves against fear and against spells and abilities that affect dreams. A yeti that falls prey to a supernatural nightmare loses this ability and becomes permanently enraged, gaining a status bonus to attack and damage rolls and a –1 status penalty to AC.
**Vanish** **Trigger** The yeti is [hidden](/Conditions.aspx?ID=22) or [undetected](/Conditions.aspx?ID=39) while not in combat, and a creature would observe it. **Effect** The yeti Strides or [Climbs](/Actions.aspx?ID=33) up to half its Speed to a location where it can [Hide](/Actions.aspx?ID=62), then Hides. If its new Stealth check result meets or exceeds the triggering creature's Perception DC, the yeti remains hidden. --- **Speed** 60 feet, climb 20 feet **Melee** claw +33 ([Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103)), **Damage** 3d10+17 slashing **Ranged** icicle +31 ([Cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=27), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [thrown 20 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=195)), **Damage** 2d8+17 piercing plus 1d8 cold **Divine Innate Spells** DC 37 - **8th** [Obscuring Mist](/Spells.aspx?ID=210) (manifests snowfall instead of mist) **Frozen Flurry** ([Cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=27)) **Frequency** once per round; **Effect** The Rai Sho postulant makes two Strikes, which can be any combination of claw or icicle Strikes. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. If either Strike hits and deals damage, the target must succeed at a DC 37 Fortitude save or be [stunned 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=36) (or stunned 3 on a critical failure); this save has the [incapacitation](/Traits.aspx?ID=93) trait. **Grisly Arrival** ([Emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=60), [Fear](/Traits.aspx?ID=68), [Mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=106)) **Trigger** The yeti hits a creature in the first round of combat and the yeti was [hidden](/Conditions.aspx?ID=22) from that creature at the start of combat. **Effect** Each enemy within 30 feet that witnesses the attack (including the target of the attack) must attempt a DC 37 Will save. On a failure, the creature is [frightened 2](/Conditions.aspx?ID=19); on a critical failure, it's frightened 4. **Nine Seals Spellcasting** The Rai Sho postulants have learned a technique that allows them to cast their ki spells more effectively by way of specialized hand postures. They replace the normal somatic and verbal components of their spells with nine seals components; these require that the caster have a hand free, but don't add any traits to the Cast a Spell action (preventing the Rai Sho postulants from triggering certain reactions, such as [Attack of Opportunity](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=3), when they Cast a Spell).

**Crying Bell Stance** <actions string="Single Action" /> ([Stance](/Traits.aspx?ID=152)) The disciple cups one hand and poses the other to strike it, like the Rai Sho Monastery's central bell. In this stance, they can make temple bell Strikes (see Strikes). While in this stance, a disciple gains a +2 status bonus to AC against ranged attacks.

**Falling Sal Stance** <actions string="Single Action" /> ([Stance](/Traits.aspx?ID=152)) The disciple joins their palms together in the shape of a sal flower, evoking the truth that all things eventually decay. In this stance, they can make sal blossom Strikes (see Strikes) and are [quickened 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=32),  and can use the extra action only to cast [wholeness of body](/Feats.aspx?ID=448).

**Flurry of Blows** <actions string="Single Action" />  **Frequency** once per round; **Effect** The Rai Sho disciple makes two Strikes, each of which must be an unarmed Strike or temple bell Strike. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

**Nine Seals Spellcasting**   The Rai Sho disciples have learned a technique to cast their ki spells more effectively by way of specialized hand postures. They replace the normal somatic and verbal components of their spells with nine seals components; these require that the user have a hand free, but do not add any traits to the Cast a Spell action (preventing the disciples from triggering certain reactions when they Cast a Spell, such as [Attack of Opportunity](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=3)). Additionally, the first time each day that a disciple critically Strikes an enemy, they regain a Focus Point.

She attempts to [counteract](/Rules.aspx?ID=371) the triggering effect. For 1 round after Absorbing Worldly Influence, a glowing orb floats within the khakkhara's central ring, allowing Tsujon to Release Worldly Passions.
**All This Has Happened Before** ([divination](/Traits.aspx?ID=47), [occult](/Traits.aspx?ID=120)) **Frequency** once per day; **Trigger** The samsaran anchorite is about to roll initiative; **Effect** The anchorite experiences a flash of recognition from a previous existence, gaining a circumstance bonus to the triggering roll. If this causes the anchorite to be the first creature to act, they also become [quickened](/Conditions.aspx?ID=32) for 1 round, but they can use the extra action only to [Recall Knowledge](/Actions.aspx?ID=26) or Step.
**All This Will Happen Again** ([fortune](/Traits.aspx?ID=76), [emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=60), [mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=106)) **Frequency** once per day; **Trigger** The samsaran anchorite fails or critically fails a Will save against an [emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=60) effect; **Effect** Even in the face of overwhelming tribulation, the anchorite finds solace in the notion that all things are merely part of a never-ending cycle. They reroll the saving throw with a status bonus; they must use the second result.
**Negate Projectiles** **Trigger** Abbot Tsujon is the target of a ranged attack; **Requirements** Abbot Tsujon is aware of the attack, is not [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) against it, and has a hand free; **Effect** Abbot Tsujon gains a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. In this stance, she can make temple bell Strikes (see Strikes) and gains a +2 status bonus to AC against ranged attacks. **Falling Sal Stance** ([Stance](/Traits.aspx?ID=152)) Abbot Tsujon joins her palms together in the shape of a sal flower, evoking the truth that all things eventually decay. In this stance, she can make sal blossom Strikes (see Strikes) and is [quickened 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=32), and can use the extra action only to cast [wholeness of body](/Feats.aspx?ID=448). **Release Worldly Passions** ([Divine](/Traits.aspx?ID=48), [Evocation](/Traits.aspx?ID=65), [Force](/Traits.aspx?ID=75), [Manipulate](/Traits.aspx?ID=104)) **Requirements** Abbot Tsujon's khakkhara holds a glowing orb from Absorb Worldly Influence; **Effect** Abbot Tsujon strikes her prayer staff once upon the ground, releasing the energy she captured in it along with the jingling of its rings. She blasts a wave of force in a 30- foot emanation, dealing 2d6 force damage per level of the ability she counteracted (DC 40 [basic](/Rules.aspx?ID=329) Reflex save). If the ability she counteracted usually deals energy damage, she can choose to deal this type of damage instead (for instance, if she used Absorb Worldly Influence to counteract a [_fireball_](/Spells.aspx?ID=119), she could deal either fire or force damage). **Stunning Flurry** **Frequency** once per round; **Effect** Abbot Tsujon makes two Strikes, each of which must be an unarmed Strike or crying temple bell Strike. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. If either Strike hits and deals damage, the target must succeed at a DC 39 Fortitude save or be [stunned 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=36) (or stunned 3 on a critical failure); this save has the [incapacitation](/Traits.aspx?ID=93) trait.
name: Abbot Tsujon

**Susceptible to Death** Though phantoms aren't alive, neither are they [undead](/Traits.aspx?ID=160), and they are uniquely vulnerable to the effects of death. A phantom whose Hit Points are reduced to 0 as a result of a [death](/Traits.aspx?ID=40) effect (such as from a spell like [_finger of death_](/Spells.aspx?ID=116)) is immediately whisked away to the River of Souls, where their soul resumes the usual path to the afterlife.
**Combined Charge** ([move Frequency once per day](/Traits.aspx?ID=114)) **Trigger** [Cloudsplitter](/Monsters.aspx?ID=1517) Strides or [Tramples](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=39) within 5 feet of Jin-Hae; **Effect** Jin-Hae leaps onto Cloudsplitter's back as he charges. She can make a single melee attack against any target they pass during Cloudsplitter's movement. --- **Speed** 40 feet **Melee** _hook sword_ +35 ([Disarm](/Traits.aspx?ID=175), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [Parry](/Traits.aspx?ID=190), [Trip](/Traits.aspx?ID=196), [Twin](/Traits.aspx?ID=197)), **Damage** 6d6+20 slashing **Melee** _linked hook swords_ +35 ([Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [reach 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=192), [Sweep](/Traits.aspx?ID=194)), **Damage** 6d6+20 slashing **Melee** _wind and fire wheels_ +35 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Disarm](/Traits.aspx?ID=175), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=179), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [Parry](/Traits.aspx?ID=190), [thrown 20 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=195), [Twin](/Traits.aspx?ID=197), [versatile P](/Traits.aspx?ID=200)), **Damage** 3d6+15 slashing plus 3d6 fire **Ranged** vacuum slash +35 ([Air](/Traits.aspx?ID=5), [Divine](/Traits.aspx?ID=48), [range 60 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248)), **Damage** 6d6+10 slashing **Divine Innate Spells** DC 40 - **Constant (7th)** [Air Walk](/Spells.aspx?ID=6) **Call a Battle Echo** ([Conjuration](/Traits.aspx?ID=33)) **Effect** Jin-Hae pulls one of the _battle echoes_ (page 19) to her hand. She is fully aware of every _echo_ and can always pull the one she wants, but she cannot call an _echo_ that has already been unsealed. **Link Swords** ([Flourish](/Traits.aspx?ID=73), [Stance](/Traits.aspx?ID=152)) **Requirements** Jin-Hae is wielding two hook swords; **Effect** Jin-Hae either links her swords together or unlinks them. If the swords are linked, she can make linked hook sword Strikes; if the swords are unlinked, she can make hook sword Strikes. **Wind-Fire Charge** ([Divine](/Traits.aspx?ID=48)) **Requirements** Jin-Hae is wielding her wind and fire wheels; **Effect** Jin-Hae blasts off on her wind and fire wheels, leaving an elemental trail in her wake. She Strides up to twice her Speed and makes a wind and fire wheel Strike at any point during her movement. The path left by her movement is filled with her choice of an 8th-level [_wall of wind_](/Spells.aspx?ID=367) or [_wall of fire_](/Spells.aspx?ID=362) spell. Jin-Hae is unaffected by any walls she creates with this ability. She cannot use Wind-Fire Charge again for 1d4 rounds. If she uses Wind-Fire Charge again, the wall created by her previous Wind-Fire Charge disappears as soon as her action is completed. **Wind-Fire Chariot** ([Divine](/Traits.aspx?ID=48)) **Requirements** Jin-Hae is wielding two wind and fire wheels; **Effect** Jin-Hae's wind and fire wheels float by her feet, giving her the benefits of 7th-level [_air walk_](/Spells.aspx?ID=6). While this lasts, she can wield her wind and fire wheels even while her hands are full by kicking with them, and her wind and fire wheels gain the [thrown 20 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=195) trait as well as the effects of a [_returning_](/Equipment.aspx?ID=301) rune.
name: Jin-Hae

Creatures within a kirin's peaceful aura attempting to use a [hostile action](/Rules.aspx?ID=300) must first attempt a DC 39 Will save; on a failure, the hostile action is disrupted. If a creature in the aura successfully uses a hostile action, it's temporarily immune to peaceful aura for 24 hours, and while it's temporarily immune, other creatures in the kirin's peaceful aura can perform hostile actions toward it without needing to attempt a Will save. A kirin can select creatures within their aura that can use hostile actions without needing to attempt a Will save. Cloudsplitter allows anyone involved in the player character's bout with [Jin-Hae](/Monsters.aspx?ID=1516) to use hostile actions without a Will save.
**Deflecting Gale** **Trigger** The kirin is targeted with a ranged Strike; **Effect** The kirin intensifies the wind around themself, gaining a circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.
**Susceptible to Death** Though phantoms aren't alive, neither are they [undead](/Traits.aspx?ID=160), and they are uniquely vulnerable to the effects of death. A phantom whose Hit Points are reduced to 0 as a result of a [death](/Traits.aspx?ID=40) effect (such as from a spell like [_finger of death_](/Spells.aspx?ID=116)) is immediately whisked away to the River of Souls, where their soul resumes the usual path to the afterlife. --- **Speed** 60 feet **Melee** phantom hoof +35 ([Force](/Traits.aspx?ID=75), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103)), **Damage** 4d10+15 force **Melee** phantom horn +35 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Force](/Traits.aspx?ID=75), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103)), **Damage** 4d8+15 force **Divine Innate Spells** DC 41 - **Cantrips (9th)** [Light](/Spells.aspx?ID=171) - **2nd** [Detect Alignment](/Spells.aspx?ID=65) (at will) - **8th** [Calm Emotions](/Spells.aspx?ID=31) (at will), [Gust of Wind](/Spells.aspx?ID=143) (×3), [Heal](/Spells.aspx?ID=148) (×2), [Punishing Winds](/Spells.aspx?ID=240), [Spirit Link](/Spells.aspx?ID=302) (with [Jin-Hae](/Monsters.aspx?ID=1516) only) - **Constant (9th)** [Air Walk](/Spells.aspx?ID=6) **Breath Weapon** ([Divine](/Traits.aspx?ID=48), [Evocation](/Traits.aspx?ID=65), [Fire](/Traits.aspx?ID=72)) Cloudsplitter breathes fire in a 30-foot cone, dealing 18d6 fire damage (DC 40 [basic](/Rules.aspx?ID=329) Reflex save). Cloudsplitter can't use Breath Weapon again for 1d4 rounds. **Rearing Thrust** The kirin rushes forward, rears up on their hind legs, and descends upon their target with their horn. The kirin Strides and makes a horn Strike. If this Strike hits, it deals an 2d8 additional damage, and the target is knocked [prone](/Conditions.aspx?ID=31). **[Trample](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=39)** Medium or smaller, phantom hoof, DC 40

**[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=14)): DC 43 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 41 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 38 [Flying Mountain Kaminari](/Monsters.aspx?ID=1518) **Source** [Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain](/Sources.aspx?ID=87) pg. 23 **Perception** +33 **Languages** [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1) +31, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) +31, [Flying Mountains Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=8) +35, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=10) +37, [Religion](/Skills.aspx?ID=13) +35 **Str** +9 **Dex** +6 **Con** +8 **Int** +5 **Wis** +5 **Cha** +4 **Stormsight** Wind, precipitation, and clouds don't impair a kaminari's vision; they ignore the [concealed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=4) condition from storms, mist, precipitation, and the like. --- **AC** 42 **Fort** +30 **Ref** +33 **Will** +27 **HP** 320 **Immunities** [air](/Traits.aspx?ID=5), [electricity](/Traits.aspx?ID=56), [sonic](/Traits.aspx?ID=147) --- **Speed** 25 feet, fly 60 feet; stormflight **Melee** fist +35 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=192), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=199)), **Damage** 5d6+17 bludgeoning **Ranged** storm blast +32 ([Air](/Traits.aspx?ID=5), [Electricity](/Traits.aspx?ID=56), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [range 120 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248)), **Damage** 4d6 bludgeoning plus 3d12 electricity **Hurricane Bag** ([Air](/Traits.aspx?ID=5)) A kaminari's bag holds the four winds. The kaminari unleashes four 20-foot bursts within 60 feet with the effects of a 9th-level [_wall of wind_](/Spells.aspx?ID=367). In addition, a creature that enters one of the bursts takes 6d6 slashing damage (DC 40 [basic](/Rules.aspx?ID=329) Reflex save). The bursts can't overlap. After using this activity the kaminari can't use Hurricane Bag for 1d4 rounds.
If a kaminari creates a column of lighting using Thunder Drums that intersects one of the areas of the wind, the wind explodes in a peal of thunder, dealing 6d10 sonic damage to creatures in the area of that wall of wind burst. Affected creatures must attempt a DC 40 Fortitude save. The kaminari can detonate only one burst per use of Thunder Drums.
**Critical Success** The target is unaffected.
**Success** The target takes half damage.
**Failure** The target takes full damage and is [deafened](/Conditions.aspx?ID=8) for 1 minute.
**Critical Failure** The target takes double damage and is deafened permanently. **Stormflight** A kaminari can move in wind with ease. They ignore all difficult terrain from wind and don't need to [Maneuver in Flight](/Actions.aspx?ID=30) in high winds. **Tempest Tether** ([Air](/Traits.aspx?ID=5), [Electricity](/Traits.aspx?ID=56)) **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** Electricity leaps between two kaminari. The kaminari establishes a connection with another kaminari within 150 feet, and lightning and thunder form a line between the centers of their spaces. For the next minute, a creature that begins its turn in the line or enters the line on its turn takes 4d12 electricity damage (DC 40 [basic](/Rules.aspx?ID=329) Reflex save). A creature can take this damage only once per round, even if it moves through several tempest tethers. If the distance between the kaminari ever exceeds 150 feet, the tether breaks. **Thunder Drums** ([Electricity](/Traits.aspx?ID=56)) The peal of a kaminari's drums bring thunder and lightning. The kaminari summons four 100-foot-tall columns of lightning to strike in 5-foot bursts within 60 feet. These columns can't overlap. Creatures in the burst take 8d12 electricity damage and must attempt a DC 40 Reflex save. The kaminari can't use Thunder Drums again for 1d4 rounds.
**Critical Success** The creature is unaffected.
**Success** The target takes half damage.
**Failure** The target takes full damage and is [stunned 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=36).
**Critical Failure** The target takes double damage and is stunned 2.
name: Flying Mountain Kaminari

The night parade sweeps up those nearby in a riotous celebration. All creatures in the [aura](/Traits.aspx?ID=206) must attempt a DC 39 Will save. The target is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes.
**Critical Success** The target is unafflicted.
**Success** The target laughs and dances. It can't use reactions as long as it stays in the area, [and if it attempts to use a <%TRAITS%32%%> concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=32) action <%END>, it must succeed at a DC 5 flat check; on a failure, the action is lost.
**Failure** As success, except the target is also [slowed 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=35) while in the area.
**Critical Failure** As success, except the target is also slowed 1 while in the area and the flat check DC is 10.
**[Attack of Opportunity](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=3)**
**[Troop Defenses](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=44)** --- **Speed** 25 feet; troop movement **Seiya! Soiya!** ([Emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=60), [Mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=106), [Sonic](/Traits.aspx?ID=147)) The night parade shouts a series of energetic call-and-responses, dealing 3d10 sonic damage and 4d6 mental damage to all creatures in a 10-foot burst within 20 feet (DC 41 [basic](/Rules.aspx?ID=329) Will save). If the troop is reduced to 8 or fewer squares, this area decreases to a 5-foot burst. **[Form Up](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=43)** **Troop Movement** Whenever a troop Strides, it first [Form Up](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=43) as a free action to condense into a 20-foot-by-20-foot area (minus any missing squares), then moves up to its Speed. This works just like a Gargantuan creature moving; for instance, if any square enters difficult terrain, the extra movement cost applies to the whole troop. **Wasshoi! Wasshoi!** **Frequency** once per round; **Effect** The night parade dances with wild abandon, unintentionally striking nearby creatures. It deals damage to each adjacent creature (DC 41 [basic](/Rules.aspx?ID=329) Reflex save), and any creature that fails its save is [pushed](/Rules.aspx?ID=451) 10 feet in any direction as the night parade bounces it overhead. The damage depends on the number of actions.
1d10+7 bludgeoning damage
4d10+14 bludgeoning damage
6d10+14 bludgeoning damage
name: Dancing Night Parade

**Call Dancers** <actions string="Two Actions" /> ([Auditory](/Traits.aspx?ID=16), [Healing](/Traits.aspx?ID=89)) Laruhao sends out a pulse of inviting melody that calls more yokai from the ether, restoring 30 Hit Points to the dancing night parade.

The dancing night parade can use either Seiya! Soiya! or the two-action version of Wasshoi! Wasshoi! as a reaction.

**Master of Barriers**   Laruhao wishes for nothing more than to dance atop his yagura, undisturbed. When he uses his [house of imaginary walls](/Feats.aspx?ID=198) composition spell, he creates four 10-foot-by-10-foot walls in a cube around him. A creature must succeed at a DC 41 [counteract](/Rules.aspx?ID=371) check to teleport within these walls; otherwise, the [teleportation](/Traits.aspx?ID=156) attempt fails.

</column>
name: Laruhao

**[Recall Knowledge - Fiend](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Religion](/Skills.aspx?ID=13)): DC 48 **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=14)): DC 48 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 46 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 43 [Tino (Oni Form)](/NPCs.aspx?ID=1521) **Source** [Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain](/Sources.aspx?ID=87) pg. 47 **Perception** +30; [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=12) **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Nagaji](/Languages.aspx?ID=87), [Tengu](/Languages.aspx?ID=47), [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43); (can't speak any language) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1) +35, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) +35, [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=5) +24, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=6) +31, [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=7) +35, [Irori Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=8) +31, [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=9) +29, [Occultism](/Skills.aspx?ID=11) +29, [Religion](/Skills.aspx?ID=13) +31 **Str** +9 **Dex** +6 **Con** +6 **Int** +5 **Wis** +5 **Cha** +4 **Items** _+3 [major striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) kanabo_ (as [greatclub](/Weapons.aspx?ID=22) with [reach](/Traits.aspx?ID=192)) --- **AC** 41 (43 with Wall of Iron) **Fort** +32 **Ref** +32 **Will** +28 **HP** 320 **[Ferocity](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=16)**
**[Retributive Strike](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=31)**
**Stalwart Guardian** Tino gains a reaction at the start of each enemy's turn that he can use only during that enemy's turn.
**Toughest Teamwork: Catapult Ally** **Trigger** An ally using a [move](/Traits.aspx?ID=114) action moves within reach of Tino's kanabo; **Effect** Tino scoops his ally with his kanabo and flings them 30 feet in any direction. They can continue any remainder of their movement from their landing location. --- **Speed** 35 feet **Melee** head +35 ([deadly d10](/Traits.aspx?ID=174), [reach 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=192), [Sweep](/Traits.aspx?ID=194)), **Damage** 5d8+17 piercing **Melee** fist +35 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=179), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=188), [reach 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=192), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=199)), **Damage** 5d6+17 bludgeoning **Melee** _kanabo_ +33 ([Backswing](/Traits.aspx?ID=173), [reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=192), [Shove](/Traits.aspx?ID=193)), **Damage** 5d10+15 bludgeoning **A Kanabo to an Oni** Tino loses himself further to the oni, pulling out even more strength. He makes a kanabo Strike that deals two additional weapon dice of damage. **Earth-Shattering Strike** **Requirements** Tino's previous action was to successfully Strike an enemy with a weapon that dealt bludgeoning damage; **Effect** A shockwave blasts out from the force of Tino's strike. Tino attempts a single [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) check again the Fortitude DC of all enemies within 15 feet. Regardless of the result of the check, all terrain within the area becomes difficult terrain as the ground is cracked into loose shards.
**Critical Success** Tino [pushes](/Rules.aspx?ID=451) the creature 10 feet, knocks it [prone](/Conditions.aspx?ID=31), and deals 6d6 bludgeoning damage to it.
**Success** Tino pushes the creature 10 feet and knocks it prone.
**Failure** Tino pushes the creature 10 feet. **Flurry of Blows** **Frequency** once per round; **Effect** Tino makes two unarmed Strikes. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. **Wall of Iron** Tino raises his kanabo defensively, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC.
name: Tino (Oni Form)

<title level="2" right="Creature 18">[Ji-Yook (Gumiho Form)](/NPCs.aspx?ID=1522)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Unique" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=161" />
<trait label="NE" url="/Rules.aspx?ID=95" />

<trait label="Kitsune" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=341" />

</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [Pathfinder #168: King of the Mountain](/Sources.aspx?ID=87) pg. 47

**Perception** +29; [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=12), emotionsense

**Languages**
[Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Nagaji](/Languages.aspx?ID=87), [Tengu](/Languages.aspx?ID=47), [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43); (can't speak any language)

**Skills**
[Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1) +37, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) +35, [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=5) +35, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=6) +31

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +2

**Dex** +6

**Con** +3

**Int** +5

**Wis** +3

**Cha** +6
</row>

**Items**
_+3 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) [returning](/Equipment.aspx?ID=301) [darts](/Weapons.aspx?ID=68)_ (5), _+3 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=280) handwraps of mighty blows_, _+2 [greater resilient](/Equipment.aspx?ID=279) [explorer's clothing](/Equipment.aspx?ID=15), _ [greater smokesticks](/Equipment.aspx?ID=135) (2)

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

<row gap="medium">
**AC** 42 

**Fort** +27 

**Ref** +34 

**Will** +29 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**HP** 331

</row>

**Immunities**
[emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=60)

**Toughest Teamwork: Unsettling Murmur** <actions string="Reaction" /> ([emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=60), [fear](/Traits.aspx?ID=68)) **Trigger** An enemy within 60 feet is the target of a Strike or attempts a Will save; **Effect** Just when an enemy is preparing to defend itself, Ji-yook sends an illusion of herself to whisper a disquieting secret or threat into their ear. The enemy takes a –2 circumstance penalty to their AC or Will save against the triggering attack or effect.

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

**Speed** 25 feet; waylay

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
claw +34 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=179), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=188), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=199)),
**Damage** 6d4+10 bludgeoning

**Ranged**
<actions string="Single Action" />
dart +34 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [reload 0](/Traits.aspx?ID=254), [thrown 20 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=195)),
**Damage** 6d4+10 piercing

**Ranged**
<actions string="Single Action" />
foxfire +34 ([range 20 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [Versatile](/Traits.aspx?ID=200)),
**Damage** 6d4+8 electricity

**[Change Shape](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=8)**   Ji-yook transforms into her human form. Using Change Shape counts as creating a disguise for the [Impersonate](/Actions.aspx?ID=46) use of [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=5). Ji-yook can remain in her human form indefinitely, and she can shift back to her true kitsune form by using this action again.

**Disquieting Change Shape** <actions string="Single Action" /> ([Concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=32), [Divine](/Traits.aspx?ID=48), [Polymorph](/Traits.aspx?ID=127), [Transmutation](/Traits.aspx?ID=157)) Ji-yook selects one enemy within 60 feet, then Changes Shape into humanoid form, taking the form of a person emotionally close to that enemy, such as a dead family member. Ji-yook is not aware of the form she will take until she transforms. If her target sees her, even if they are aware it is a trick, they must attempt a DC 40 Will save or be [frightened 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=19) (frightened 2 on a critical failure) for 1 round. This is a [fear](/Traits.aspx?ID=68) effect.

**Foxfire Blast** <actions string="Two Actions" />  **Frequency** once per round; Effect Ji-yook makes a fist strike. On a hit, the target takes an additional 3d6 electricity damage and is [pushed](/Rules.aspx?ID=451) back 5 feet. On a critical hit, the target is pushed back and then knocked [prone](/Conditions.aspx?ID=31).

**Pinning Shot** <actions string="Single Action" />  Ji-yook makes a dart Strike. If the attack hits, it deals no damage and instead imparts the [bow critical specialization](/WeaponGroups.aspx?ID=3) effect against the target. If the attack is a critical hit, the target must succeed at two separate Interact actions to pull the missile free. The target is [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) while it remains [immobilized](/Conditions.aspx?ID=24) in this way.

**[Sneak Attack](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=34)**   Ji-yook's Strikes deal an extra 4d6 precision damage to [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) creatures.

**Waylay**  ([Illusion](/Traits.aspx?ID=92)) When Ji-yook Strides at least 10 feet, illusions make her [concealed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=4) until the start of her next turn.

</column>
name: Ji-Yook (Gumiho Form)

**Toughest Teamwork: Wind Shell** ([abjuration](/Traits.aspx?ID=2), [air](/Traits.aspx?ID=5)) **Trigger** An ally within 60 feet is targeted by a physical ranged attack; **Effect** Takatorra wraps their ally in a protective shell of air. The ally gains a +4 status bonus to AC against physical ranged attacks until the beginning of their next turn. --- **Speed** 25 feet, fly 60 feet **Melee** _tengu gale blade_ +35 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=170), [Disarm](/Traits.aspx?ID=175), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=103), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=179)), **Damage** 4d6+14 slashing **Ranged** vacuum slash +35 ([Air](/Traits.aspx?ID=5), [range 120 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248)), **Damage** 6d6+14 slashing **Blade Barrage** Takatorra unleashes a flurry of attacks. Takatorra makes five melee Strikes. They gain a cumulative +2 circumstance bonus to damage for each successful Strike. If one target is hit with at least two of these Strikes, they also take 2d6 [persistent bleed damage](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29). They then become [stunned 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=36) and [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) until the start of their next turn. **Disarming Whirl** ([Flourish](/Traits.aspx?ID=73)) Takatorra spins, striking at their foes' weapons. Takatorra attempts an [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) check to [Disarm](/Actions.aspx?ID=41) against each enemy within their melee reach. Each attempt counts toward Takatorra's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until they have made all the attempts. **Airflow Blades** ([Air](/Traits.aspx?ID=5)) Takatorra extends the cutting surface of their blades with high-pressure airflow. Until the end of their turn, their blades have a [reach](/Traits.aspx?ID=192) of 15 feet.
name: Takatorra (Daitengu Form)

She attempts to [Trip](/Actions.aspx?ID=40) the creature.
**Spiraling Web** **Trigger** Syu Tak-nwa is the target of a ranged Strike or ranged spell attack roll; **Requirements** Syu Tak-nwa is aware of the attack and not [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) against it; **Effect** Hairs erupt from portals around the missile and attempt to wrap around it. **10th** [Cackle](/Spells.aspx?ID=792), [Curse of Death](/Spells.aspx?ID=794), [Malicious Shadow](/Spells.aspx?ID=800), [Needle of Vengeance](/Spells.aspx?ID=801) **Empowered Hair** Tak-nwa's mastery over her prehensile hair while in the _Glass Lighthouse_ is so powerful that she can walk on thick strands like giant spider legs. This makes her immune to tripping, and she ignores the effects of difficult terrain (but not greater difficult terrain). She can use her living hair to perform precise tasks such as picking up objects and performing simple Interact actions. She can also deliver hexes through her hair. Whenever Tak-nwa successfully casts a [hex](/Traits.aspx?ID=324) focus spell that requires 2 or more actions to cast and that doesn't require a spell attack roll, if her target is within reach, as part of the spellcasting activity she can make a hair Strike against the foe before applying any effects of the hex. Yon-so has a fly Speed of 40 feet, [darkvision](/Familiars.aspx?ID=5), and [scent](/Familiars.aspx?ID=11) as an imprecise sense to a range of 30 feet. Yon-so can speak Tien, and when Yon-so rolls a success on a Reflex or Fortitude save it takes no damage against the effect. **Silkworm's Basket** ([Certain Kill](/Traits.aspx?ID=384), [Conjuration](/Traits.aspx?ID=33)) Syu Tak-nwa tears thousands of minute portals into space, sending a single hair through each. She can't create more than one basket at a time.
